title: pow: E2E test — gate, rejection, replay
description:
E2E integration test in relay/tests/pow_e2e.rs proving the PoW gate works end-to-end.

What: Four test cases exercising the complete PoW flow.

Test setup helper:
- spawn_relay_with_pow(difficulty: u8) → String: starts relay with state.set_pow_difficulty(difficulty)
- difficulty=1 makes mining fast (~50% chance per attempt)

Test 1: pow_gate_allows_valid_mined_token
  1. spawn_relay_with_pow(1)
  2. transport::connect(&url, &alice, false, None) — connect() automatically mines PoW
  3. wait_for_directory_list (proves auth succeeded)
  Oracle: successful connection to a PoW-enabled relay; DirectoryList proves auth succeeded

Test 2: pow_gate_rejects_missing_token
  1. spawn_relay_with_pow(1)
  2. Manual connection: open WS, receive Challenge, sign but do NOT include pow_token
  3. Send AuthenticateParams { pub_key, nonce, signature, pow_token: None }
  4. Expect response with error.code == POW_REQUIRED (-32030)
  Oracle: pow_token=None when difficulty>0 must return POW_REQUIRED

Test 3: pow_gate_rejects_stale_token
  1. spawn_relay_with_pow(1)
  2. Manual: open WS, receive Challenge, sign
  3. Craft token manually with ts_floor = (now/60 - 11) (11 minutes ago, outside ±10 window)
  4. Mine valid PoW for that stale ts_floor (diff=1 so it's fast)
  5. Send AuthenticateParams with stale token
  6. Expect response with error.code == POW_STALE (-32032)
  Oracle: ts_floor > 10 minutes ago must return POW_STALE

Test 4: pow_gate_rejects_replayed_token
  1. spawn_relay_with_pow(1)
  2. alice connects successfully (auto-mines token T1, captured)
  3. alice disconnects
  4. Replay T1 in a new manual connection (same token)
  5. Expect response with error.code == POW_REPLAYED (-32033)
  Wait — T1 was sent by transport::connect() which doesn't expose the raw token.
  Alternative: mine a token manually (difficulty=1), submit twice in two separate manual connections
  Second submission of same h16 must return POW_REPLAYED

Defensive note: tests must NOT use difficulty=0 (that disables PoW and the tests would trivially pass without actually testing the gate).
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p nie-relay -- pow_e2e passes; all four test cases pass; no hardcoded results
close_reason: relay/tests/pow_e2e.rs: 4 tests — allows_valid, rejects_missing, rejects_stale, rejects_replayed — all pass
